description: Stylish and super comfy flip flops from cobblerz for the fashion conscious and the comfort junkies. Hand crafted, this piece offers styling and enhanced comfort with its luxe footbed. Comes with a shoe horn.UpperThong style strap with a buckle detailPadded, printed footbedSynthetic toe separatorUpper adhered to the outsoleOutsoleThick rubber outsole with patterned guitar shaped grooves Flip flop careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a leather brush to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
